productName: Mama J's - Bubble Hash Preroll Packs - RS11 - 0.5gx2
description: A hybrid pre-roll of RS11 supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, peach, and citrus, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
